expectations.text: Correctly states that GitHub does NOT support importing secrets (only overwrite-destination is available)
expectations.evidence: "GitHub repository secrets have a key limitation: GitHub doesn't support importing secrets back into Infisical. This means you can't directly read your existing GitHub secrets" and "overwrite-destination as the initial behavior (the only option GitHub supports)"

expectations.text: Recommends backing up or manually exporting existing GitHub secrets before syncing
expectations.evidence: "Step 1: Inventory Your Existing Secrets - Before creating any sync, document all your existing GitHub secrets" and "manually add all your existing GitHub secrets into Infisical"

expectations.text: Mentions repository scope option for GitHub sync destination
expectations.evidence: Lists GitHub scope options: 'For Repository Secrets: Scope: repository, Repository: Specify as owner/repo'
"Step 2: Set Up Your GitHub App Connection" and "Create an App Connection to authenticate Infisical with GitHub"

expectations.text: Recommends Key Schema or Disable Secret Deletion to protect manually-managed secrets
expectations.evidence: "Key Schema: Highly recommended — use something like INFISICAL_{{secretKey}}" and "Disable Secret Deletion: Consider enabling this if you have secrets in GitHub that you're not syncing from Infisical yet"

expectations.text: Warns that existing GitHub secrets not in Infisical may be overwritten
expectations.evidence: "Any secrets not in Infisical at sync time risk being overwritten or deleted" and "overwrite-destination as the initial behavior (the only option GitHub supports)"
